# empty-quantity

Empty quantity string is ignored (parseQuantityPtr nil path)

!!! tip "Direction: `from`"

| | |
| --- | --- |
| Direction | `from` |
| Path | `testdata/cases/regressions/empty-quantity` |

## Input

### `argocd-cmd-params-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-cmd-params-cm
data:
  reposerver.max.combined.directory.manifests.size: ""
  redis.server: argocd-redis:6379
```

## Expected ArgoCDConfiguration

### `configuration.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
kind: ArgoCDConfiguration
metadata:
  name: argocd-config
  namespace: argocd
spec:
  commitServer: {}
  controller: {}
  redis:
    server: argocd-redis:6379
  repoServer: {}
  server: {}
```
